name: rune
description: FHE-encrypted organizational memory for teams. Capture and retrieve institutional knowledge with zero-knowledge privacy.

rune.description: Rune MCP server entry point. Routes through the always-present bin/rune bootstrap (the CLI's documented 'mcp-server' entry point) so a fresh install self-heals: on first spawn it installs the CLI + rune-mcp if missing, then forwards stdio to ~/.rune/bin/rune-mcp, which boots dormant until /rune:configure. No manual /mcp reconnect needed.
